name: Son Pan
description:
ART BY blannis_art

Son Pan is a confident, high-spirited martial artist whose adventurous nature never faded with age. By 23, she’s grown into a strong, athletic fighter with a bold sense of style and an even bolder personality. She’s quick to step into action, fiercely loyal to her family, and unafraid to challenge anyone who underestimates her. Despite her fiery temper and impulsive streak, Pan’s optimism, resilience, and big heart make her a dependable ally—someone who charges forward not just out of pride, but out of genuine care for those she wants to protect.
creator: LyDaHoodge
